features: Property type now normalizes to Retail or Residential where applicable
Property type appears under the property name
Removed online/offline concept for client properties
Properties are treated as saved/active as long as they exist in the database
Fixed Property Details action button text/padding overflow
Replaced property mini-map with guard-style Leaflet/fallback map
Property detail map supports same marker cards, route line, ETA/distance behavior
Guard marker appears only after guard accepts/in-progress assignment for that property
